backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, Workout, Transaction, MealLog, DailyMetrics) and CRUD endpoints for a fitness/finance tracker app, with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three implemented features: replacing the automatic step counter with a manual input, showing a real-time AI calorie burn estimate from step count, and persisting manual steps to the backend via the existing logDailyMetrics mutation.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document providing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference for the app's component and page structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property color tokens for light and dark themes, including sidebar, chart, and semantic UI colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the FinFit PWA, setting up viewport meta tags, PWA manifest link, Apple touch icon, and mounting the React app at the root div.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for FinFit defining app name, display mode, theme/background colors, orientation, and icon references for installability.
frontend/public/service-worker.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first strategy for static assets and network-first for navigation, while bypassing all ICP canister and Internet Identity network requests.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that registers the PWA service worker, checks authentication and profile state, and conditionally renders AuthScreen, ProfileSetupModal, or Dashboard.
frontend/src/components/CurrencySelector: Dropdown component that lets the user select a preferred currency and persists the change to their backend profile via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/DailyMetricsForm: A form component for logging daily fitness metrics (calories, steps, date) that submits data via the `useLogDailyMetrics` mutation hook and shows toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/FinanceAISuggest: Generates and displays rule-based financial suggestions (50/30/20 budget analysis, profession-specific tips) based on the user's transactions and profile data.
A monthly calendar component that visualizes finance transactions by date with color-coded category dots and shows transaction details for a selected day.
frontend/src/components/FinanceProfileFo: A form for saving the user's monthly income and profession to their finance profile, using the `useUpdateFinanceProfile` mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/FitnessAISuggest: Generates and displays personalized fitness suggestions based on the user's goal (cut/bulk), workouts, daily metrics, BMI, calorie targets, and step counts.
A monthly calendar component that displays workout and daily metrics activity per day with indicators, and shows detailed workout and metrics info for a selected date.
frontend/src/components/FitnessProfileFo: A form component for updating a user's fitness profile (body weight, height, goal weight, workout split) with validation and toast notifications on save.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying the app copyright year and a branded link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/GoalSelector.tsx: A toggle button component that lets users switch their fitness goal between 'Cut' and 'Bulk', with optimistic UI updates and toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/MealList.tsx: Displays a list of logged meals for a given date, showing meal name, portion size, and calories, plus a daily calorie total.
frontend/src/components/MealLogForm.tsx: A meal logging form with a client-side heuristic calorie estimator that parses food keywords and portion sizes to auto-estimate calories before submission.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: An onboarding modal dialog that collects a new user's basic info, financial details, and fitness profile (including workout split) to initialize their account.
frontend/src/components/StepTrackerWidge: An empty file with no implemented content.
Renders a sorted list of financial transactions with category icons, formatted dates, and color-coded amounts (positive/negative).
frontend/src/components/TransactionLogFo: A form component for logging financial transactions with fields for description, amount, category (needs/saving/investment/other), and date, using the useLogTransaction mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/WorkoutLogForm.t: A form component for logging workouts with fields for muscle group, exercise, sets, reps, weight, duration, and date, including a live calorie burn preview via estimateCaloriesBurned.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, workouts, daily metrics, transactions, and fitness/finance profile updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useStepTracker.ts: A hook that tracks daily step counts using the DeviceMotion API with a low-pass filter and peak detection algorithm, persisting counts to localStorage and supporting auto-save callbacks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Space Grotesk fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for the FinFit light/dark theme including color tokens for fitness, finance, and chart accents using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AuthScreen.tsx: Authentication screen displaying a hero section with FinFit branding and feature highlights alongside a login/signup panel that triggers Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard layout with a sticky header showing the user's principal, a bottom navigation bar to switch between Fitness and Finance sections, and logout functionality.
frontend/src/pages/FinanceSection.tsx: Finance tab content showing quick stats (total spend, savings, investments), a finance profile form, currency selector, transaction log form, and tabbed views for transaction list and AI advisor.
frontend/src/pages/FitnessSection.tsx: Fitness tab content displaying today's workout count, calories, and steps stats, along with forms for logging workouts, daily metrics, and meals, plus a manual step counter with calorie estimation and tabbed views for calendar and AI suggestions.
frontend/src/utils/calorieCalculator.ts: Provides MET-based calorie burn estimation for workout sessions using a keyword-to-MET lookup table, with functions to calculate calories for a single exercise or an array of workouts.
frontend/src/utils/stepCalorieCalculator: Estimates calories burned from a step count using a weight-adjusted heuristic of ~0.04 kcal/step at 70 kg, scaling linearly with body weight.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the FinFit app, defining custom colors (using oklch), fonts, border radii, shadows, animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the FinFit project's current state, including a pending feature request to replace the broken automatic step counter with a manual step entry field that shows AI-calculated calorie estimates and persists data to the backend.
